title: Messages request with top-level system prompt

messages.content: 解释什么是 API 兼容性测试。

expect.notes: Current test config has DashScope Messages access to deepseek-v4-pro, so this case uses it for API-level compatibility validation. 关闭 thinking 后验证该参数，避免 DashScope Messages 将 reasoning token 计入 usage.output_tokens。
